steps.title: Check current serverless-workflow deployment
steps.description:
Verify your serverless-workflow version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n serverless-workflow -l app.kubernetes.io/name=serverless-workflow
helm list -n serverless-workflow 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working serverless-workflow installation.

steps.title: Review serverless-workflow configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant serverless-workflow configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n serverless-workflow -l app.kubernetes.io/name=serverless-workflow
kubectl get configmap -n serverless-workflow -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=serverless-workflow
```
**What would you like to be added**:

1. Rename the `rest` operation type into `openapi`: the actual REST operation is an `openapi` operation, and could therefore be confusing to some.
2.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Refactor `rest` Operation
steps.description:
I liked the idea and this will help us on Kogito to reuse some work :)

About the REST function definition _per se_, I like the [JAX-RS approach of using annotations](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jakarta_RESTful_Web_Services), we could leverage their docs to avoid reinventing the wheel. I remember
```yaml
- name: MyOperation
  operation: 'http://mysite.com/api/{pathParam}#POST'
  type: rest
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n serverless-workflow -l app.kubernetes.io/name=serverless-workflow
kubectl get events -n serverless-workflow --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Refactor `rest` Operation" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
I liked the idea and this will help us on Kogito to reuse some work :)

About the REST function definition _per se_, I like the [JAX-RS approach of using annotations](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jakarta_RESTful_Web_Services), we could leverage their docs to avoid reinventing the wheel. I remember proposing something like this in the past before having openapi functions.
codeSnippets:
- name: MyAction
  functionRef:
    refName: MyOperation
    arguments:
      headers:
        - name: headerParam
          value: 'headerValue'
      path:
        - name: pathParam   #references the {pathParam} value in the operation url
          value: 'myendpoint' #replaces the {pathParam} value in the operation url
      query:
        - name: queryParam
          value: 'queryvalue'
      cookie:
        - name: cookieParam
          value: 'cookievalue'
      body:
        firstName: Tihomir
        lastName: Surdilovic

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with serverless-workflow installed or the issue environment reproducible.
